title: Angers, Pays de la Loire — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Angers is a city in Pays de la Loire with a population of 153,000. A charming city on the Maine River, known for its medieval castle, lush gardens, and relaxed pace of life.
